info.title: PLSP Project API
info.description: API documentation for PLSP (Personnel Learning & Succession Planning) project

get.description: Retrieves a list of all audit log entries

200.description: List of audit log entries

post.description: Creates a new category with the provided data

201.description: The category has been successfully created

get.description: Retrieves a list of all categories

200.description: List of categories

get.description: Retrieves a single category by its UUID

200.description: The category with the given ID

patch.description: Updates an existing category by its UUID

200.description: The category has been successfully updated

delete.description: Deletes a category by its UUID (soft delete)

200.description: The category has been successfully deleted

post.description: Creates a new classification rule with score range and label
